## Summary
Short description of the prompt change and the agent(s) affected.

## Motivation
- Why is this change needed?
- What problem or behavior are we trying to improve?

## Scope of change
- Files changed (prompt/path):
- Agents / workflows impacted:

## Expected behavior
- How should the agent behave after this change?
- What must NOT change (non-goals)?

## Tests / Evaluation
- Test cases run (inputs used):
- Comparison vs previous version (better/worse/same):
- Any automated checks (if available):

## Rollback plan
- Which previous prompt version should we revert to if this fails?
